tags.name: Kavala Ranch Park
tags.description: Kavala Ranch Park is a 4.8 acre neighborhood park located in the Kavala Ranch subdivision north of Kiefer Road and east of Sunrise Boulevard. The large multi-use turf area allows for many different recreation experiences.

tags.name: Sandpiper Park
tags.description: Sandpiper Park is the southern-most park in Anatolia. A large picnic pavilion overlooks two playgrounds and a sprawling, open grass area with a soccer field. The park also offers access to the Anatolia bike trail.

tags.name: Eagle's Nest Park
tags.description: Situated adjacent to the Anatolia Community Club House, this four-acre park offers a number of family-friendly features, including multiple playgrounds, a climbing surface, basketball court and large covered picnic pavilion. Tennis courts are lit for nigh

tags.name: Heron Landing Park

tags.name: Argonaut Park
tags.description: Located across from Sunrise Elementary School in Anatolia, this newly constructed six-acre park features a picnic pavilion, picnic areas and playground. Recreational athletes can take advantage of a half court basketball court and turf Baseball field.

tags.name: Sunridge Park
tags.description: Sunridge Park is located on seven-acres north of Kiefer Road and east of Sunrise Boulevard. The park features a splash park, picnic areas, playground, basketball and turf area.

tags.name: Young Wo Memorial Site
tags.description: The Young Wo Memorial is a burial ground primarily for people from the Chung Shan District of China. The Chinese pioneers who struggled for economic survival and human dignity helped build Folsom and the West and are buried here at this memorial.

tags.name: Gateway Park
tags.description: Gateway Park is a very large, undeveloped park with a trail running parallel to Hillcrest Drive. There is also a backstop and open field area for unorganized sports. Gateway Park is pet friendly however pets must be on a leash at all times.
